metadata.title: Free Bedtime Story Generator - AI Stories for Kids at Bedtime
metadata.description: Generate original, age-appropriate bedtime stories for children in seconds. Personalize by age group, theme, moral lesson, and more. Free and unlimited.
metadata.keywords: bedtime story generator, AI bedtime story, kids bedtime story, children's story generator, bedtime stories for kids, AI story for children, free bedtime story

ui.title: Bedtime Story Generator
ui.subtitle: Create a personalized, age-appropriate bedtime story for your child in seconds.

placeholders.story_idea: What should the story be about? (e.g. 'A small bunny who is afraid of the dark finds a glowing firefly friend')

validation.enter_story_idea: Please enter a story idea for the bedtime story.

errors.generation_failed: Failed to generate the story. Please try again.

output.title: Your Bedtime Story
output.empty_message: Your personalized bedtime story will appear here. Cozy up and get ready to read aloud!

random_prompts: A small bunny who is afraid of the dark discovers that fireflies are the stars' tiny helpers
A little cloud who can't rain properly learns to make the most beautiful rainbow instead
A sleepy dinosaur who keeps losing his favorite blanket before bedtime
Two mice who live inside a library and go on adventures through the books at night
A young dragon who accidentally sneezes glitter instead of fire
A baby elephant who is the only one in her herd afraid of water
A friendly moon who comes down to earth one night to see what children dream about
A tiny robot who learns what it means to be a good friend
A bear cub who wants to stay awake to see the first snowflake of winter
A mermaid who wishes she could walk on land and the seahorse who helps her

feature_intro.name: feature_intro
feature_intro.label: Overview
feature_intro.title: What Is a Bedtime Story Generator?
feature_intro.description:
A Bedtime Story Generator uses AI to create original, age-appropriate stories tailored to your child's needs — all in seconds. Instead of searching through books or repeating the same stories, this Bedtime Story Generator lets you describe any scenario, pick a theme, and instantly receive a warm, calming story ready to read aloud at bedtime.

Every story from this Bedtime Story Generator is crafted specifically for children, with vocabulary and plot complexity matched to the age group you select. You can personalize with your child's name, embed a gentle moral lesson, and choose a calming or adventurous ending — making bedtime something your child actually looks forward to.

feature_benefits.name: feature_benefits
feature_benefits.label: Benefits
feature_benefits.title: Why Use This Bedtime Story Generator
feature_benefits.description: Every story is original, safe, and perfectly tailored for your child.

items.title: Age-Appropriate Language
items.description: This Bedtime Story Generator calibrates vocabulary, sentence length, and story complexity based on your child's age — from simple two-sentence paragraphs for toddlers to richer narratives for older readers.

items.title: Personalized Every Night
items.description: Add your child's name, pick their favorite theme, and choose a moral lesson. The Bedtime Story Generator creates a different story every time, so bedtime never feels repetitive.

items.title: Calming Sleep Routine
items.description: Stories from this Bedtime Story Generator are designed to help children wind down. Choose the Calm & Sleepy ending mood and let the gentle narrative guide your child toward sleep.

how_to_use.name: how_to_use
how_to_use.label: HOW TO USE
how_to_use.title: How to Use the Bedtime Story Generator
how_to_use.description: Create a personalized bedtime story for your child in three easy steps.

items.title: Describe Your Story Idea
items.description: Type a simple story idea — it could be a character, a problem, or just a scene. Use the Surprise Me button for instant inspiration.

items.title: Choose Age, Theme & Mood
items.description: Select your child's age group and a story theme. Optionally add a moral lesson and your child's name to personalize the story.

items.title: Generate and Read Aloud
items.description: Click Generate and receive a complete, original bedtime story ready to read aloud. Copy and save for future bedtime use.

feature_section.name: applications
feature_section.label: Use Cases
feature_section.title: Who Uses This Bedtime Story Generator
feature_section.description: Perfect for parents, grandparents, and educators who want original stories every night.

items.title: Parents at Bedtime
items.description: Generate a fresh, original bedtime story every night without repeating the same books. The Bedtime Story Generator saves time and makes bedtime special.

items.title: Grandparents & Caregivers
items.description: Not sure what story to tell? Use the Bedtime Story Generator to create a warm, personal story in seconds — even if you're not a natural storyteller.

items.title: Teachers & Educators
items.description: Create classroom read-aloud stories matched to your students' reading level and current lesson theme with the Bedtime Story Generator.

faq_section.name: faq
faq_section.label: FAQ
faq_section.title: Bedtime Story Generator FAQs
faq_section.description: Common questions about using a Bedtime Story Generator for children.

items.title: Are the bedtime stories safe for young children?
items.description: Yes. This Bedtime Story Generator is designed to produce child-safe, age-appropriate content. The AI is instructed to avoid any scary, violent, or inappropriate content. Stories are warm, gentle, and positive.

items.title: Can I add my child's name to the story?
items.description: Yes. Enter your child's name in the optional Child's Name field and the Bedtime Story Generator will naturally weave it into the story, making the experience feel personal and magical.

items.title: What age groups does this Bedtime Story Generator support?
items.description: The Bedtime Story Generator supports four age groups: Toddlers (2-3), Preschool (4-5), Early Readers (6-8), and Middle Grade (9-12). Each group gets stories with vocabulary and complexity matched to that age.

items.title: Can I teach a moral lesson through the bedtime story?
items.description: Yes. The Bedtime Story Generator offers moral lessons like kindness, bravery, sharing, honesty, and more. The moral is woven naturally into the story — it is never stated outright or preachy.

items.title: How long are the generated bedtime stories?
items.description: You can choose from three lengths: Short (3-5 min read-aloud), Medium (7-10 min), or Long (12-15 min). The Bedtime Story Generator targets the word count to match your selected reading time.

items.title: Is the Bedtime Story Generator free?
items.description: Yes. You can use the Bedtime Story Generator for free with no account required. Generate as many stories as you need for your nightly bedtime routine.

cta_section.name: cta
cta_section.title: Create Tonight's Bedtime Story
cta_section.description: Use the Bedtime Story Generator to create a warm, personalized story your child will love — in seconds.
